description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests, testing indexed_gzip unit tests across multiple Python versions and operating systems. The workflow should use a matrix strategy to test on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with Python 2.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, and 3.11, and run tests with different arguments. Additionally, run quick tests on a 32-bit platform with Python 2.7 and 3.8.
